meta.title: ROBO > SOC | University Robotics Society
meta.description: University of Nottingham Robotics Society: workshops, robotics projects and the UniBots competition, open to every student.

about.heading: Who are we?
paragraphs: [[RoboSoc]] is the university's robotics society. We build autonomous robots, run workshops, and compete nationally.
No experience? Perfect. We teach Arduino, CAD, computer vision, and ML for robotics from zero. Weekly build nights, parts provided, mentors on-hand.
Our flagship focus is [[UniBots]] — we give every member the teaching, materials and team support needed to build a competition robot.
about.imageAlt: UoN Robotics Society members together at a society event

competition.heading: Build. Learn. Compete.
competition.body: We teach every skill and provide every material you need to build a robot for UniBots. No application, no prior experience — everyone is welcome.

points.label: SKILLS_TAUGHT
points.text: Arduino, CAD, coding, electronics and machining.

points.label: MATERIALS_PROVIDED
points.text: Tools, parts and resources are included.

points.label: OPEN_TO_EVERYONE
points.text: Beginners and experienced builders join alike.

competition.imageAlt: UoN Robotics Society workshop with students learning robotics

join.heading: Join RoboSoc
join.body: Get workshop access, equipment, mentorship and a place on our UniBots competition team. Zero experience required. Membership is purchased through the Students' Union.

contact.text: Message us on Discord or Instagram

footer.tagline: Built for students. Open to everyone.
